name: Clear-Wait: 4-day delay + 7-day cover + only STANDARD customer exposure
rubric_notes: Delay (96h) is comfortably within stock cover (168h). The STANDARD customer order at 96h deadline is fulfillable from current stock. STANDARD-tier exposure does not by itself trigger CRITICAL/HIGH severity per RUBRIC §3 (no tier-up rule). The 15% premium on OKChoice isn't worth it given the small risk. Confidence HIGH on the wait call; MEDIUM is acceptable if the Arbiter wants to flag that customer-tier weights sometimes get re-assessed in production.
